name: anti-crawl-a
description: Agent needs to scrape a technical forum (e.g., WeChat article, Feishu doc) for debugging information. The forum blocks direct HTTP requests.

setup.repo_state: Agent needs to fetch content from a protected web page
setup.error_message: Failed to fetch web page: TLS SNI blocked, connection refused, or 403 forbidden. Tried curl, requests, Playwright — all failed.

fix_commands: Check if the site is behind GFW or Cloudflare
Use proxy or alternative scraping method
Consider using open-source mirror or API instead
